Looking for some restaurant recommendations in Austin tx for date night ✨

A go-to date night restaurant in Austin, TX ❤️

@pecansquarecafe is known for its seasonal menu, so dishes rotate often depending on what’s in season, but their pastas and pizzas always hit, and their classic local greens (simple, but one of the best things on the table) never miss!

This visit we ordered the pasta special, speck & potato pizza, roast chicken, and vegetable fritters! 🍴

Warm, cozy, romantic vibes inside, plus great cocktails. Perfect for Valentine’s Day, but also an easy pick for a girls’ night or a long dinner with wine 🍷

📍 1200 W 6th St.

#atx #austinfoodadventures

✨3 Austin Restaurants Worth the Splurge✨
Eating out is like theater hitting all the senses while also connecting with people you love. These places take care of their customers, care about ingredients, and make you feel special, so when you’re looking for a place you trust these are experiences I keep thinking about food, design, and people wise here:

1- @restaurantfrancois You’re going to love the newest French restaurant downtown from @redashitalia & @jcarversatx 🇫🇷

2- @fishshopatx has seafood & raw bar offerings you can’t get anywhere else and their daily specials are what you need to look out for since they drive to the airport to pick up new fish everyday 🦀

3- @emmerandrye don’t forget about these guys! They might be on Rainey, but their service and creativity is unmatched! 🍸
